article_title: Critical Citrix NetScaler Flaw Draws Active Reconnaissance as Security Firms Warn of Imminent Exploitation

content_preview.title: Critical Citrix NetScaler Flaw Draws Active Reconnaissance as Security Firms Warn of Imminent Exploitation
content_preview.summary: CVE-2026-3055, a CVSS 9.3 memory overread in NetScaler ADC and Gateway, echoes the 2023 CitrixBleed vulnerability that led to mass exploitation, with over 30,000 instances exposed online.
content_preview.body_excerpt:
## Overview

Citrix has released an emergency patch for CVE-2026-3055, a critical out-of-bounds memory read vulnerability affecting its NetScaler ADC and NetScaler Gateway appliances. Rated 9.3 on the CVSS v4.0 scale, the flaw allows unauthenticated remote attackers to extract sensitive information -- including active session tokens -- from device memory.
